protocol: real numbers looked up AFTER synthetic distributions were recorded

results.question: Do you approve of Trump's job performance?
Do you approve of the way Congress is handling its job?
Is the economy getting better or worse?
results.notes: binary better/worse framing; no explicit 'same' option

results.question: Are your personal finances better off than a year ago?
results.source: Gallup Economy and Personal Finance Survey

results.question: Do you support increasing border patrol on the US-Mexico border?
results.notes: 59% favor, down from 76% in 2024; oppose/unsure estimated from residuals

results.question: Do you support granting legal status to DREAMers brought to the US as children?
Do you support increasing deportation of undocumented immigrants?
results.notes: corroborated by Feb 2026 AP-NORC: 52% say deportations gone too far

results.question: Do you support repealing the Affordable Care Act?
results.source: KFF Health Tracking Poll (favorability proxy, n=1,343)

results.question: Do you support Medicare for all?
results.source: Economist/YouGov (corroborated by Data for Progress Nov 2025: 65%)

results.question: Do you support a carbon tax on fossil fuels?
results.source: Yale Climate Change in the American Mind, Spring 2026
results.notes: pay-for-damages framing; explicit carbon-tax wording trends ~67%

results.question: Do you support requiring renewable energy production?
Do you support raising taxes on income over $400k?
Do you support raising the minimum wage to $15 per hour?
Do you support forgiving student loan debt up to $50k?
results.source: Data for Progress Mar 2026 + AP-NORC May 2024 composite
results.notes: no poll directly tests $50k; synthesized estimate, uncertainty ±10pp
